name: Section: testimonials
visual: Social proof: 2–4 named quote cards (quote, person, company, city — never anonymous) plus an aggregate metric/rating badge. Optional client photo and a linked case study.
placement: Slot 7 (briefing backbone) — right after values, as the credibility pivot; or as a carousel lower down. 2–3 col cards, or a rotating slider with arrows.
states: Carousel auto-rotates with arrows/dots; cards lift on hover; star rating renders inline.
animation: Carousel auto-rotates (cross-fade or slide, ~5–6s) with arrows/dots; cards lift on hover; star rating can animate its fill.
realWorld: Avalon: named quotes w/ company + city + case-study links

designLanguage.any: Named quote cards + aggregate rating badge.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded cards w/ avatar, soft shadow, carousel.
designLanguage.warm: Hairline quote cards on paper, rose accent mark.
